title: ANC - Change ANC Mode value (Adaptive/Standard)
scenario: ANC mode selection (Adaptive/Standard) does not persist after closing and reopening the ANC tab in Device Settings
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Close the ANC tab (e.g., tap Back or navigate away)
Reopen ANC tab via Device Settings → Audio Settings → ANC
Repeat steps 6-9 with ANC mode: Standard
expected: The selected ANC mode (Adaptive or Standard) remains unchanged after closing and reopening the ANC tab.
